title: Aaghaaz
subTitle: Govind, a young man, relocates to the city with his sister, Ratna, after a tragic experience. However, he interferes with the local mafia's plans and lands in trouble with them.

title: Doli Saja Ke Rakhna
subTitle: Inder and Pallavi fall for each other but her three possessive brothers hate him. Resultantly, the couple elopes but they soon find themselves missing their families and decide to return.

title: Take 2 Extraaa
subTitle: Discover the behind-the-scenes world of popular films, with the cast and crew revealing their unique experiences and interesting stories from the set.

title: Take 2 Extraaa
subTitle: Discover the behind-the-scenes world of popular films, with the cast and crew revealing their unique experiences and interesting stories from the set.

title: Take 2 Extraaa
subTitle: Discover the behind-the-scenes world of popular films, with the cast and crew revealing their unique experiences and interesting stories from the set.

title: Naach
subTitle: Two lovers, Reva and Abhinav, try to succeed in the film industry but drift apart due to their irreconcilable differences.

title: Commando
subTitle: A disavowed commando escapes captivity after a year of torture at the hands of the chinese. On his way back to India, he is roped into protecting a woman from a local goon that wants to marry her.

title: Shola Aur Shabnam
subTitle: Divya loves Karan and plans to get married to him. However, a notorious gangster's brother, Bali, who also has his eyes on her, goes to great lengths to destroy her relationship with Karan.

title: Dil Hai Betaab
subTitle: Meena and Raja, who are in love with each other, decide to marry. However, when her father's employer asks for Meena's hand in marriage, he accepts his proposal and ruins his daughter's life.

title: Aatish Feel the Fire
subTitle: To support his younger brother, Avinash, Baba joins the world of crime. However, their worlds turn upside down when Avinash becomes a police officer and is ordered to arrest Baba.

title: Naseeb
subTitle: The lives of friends Namdev, Raghu, Damu and Jaggi take a turn for the worse when they win a lottery. Raghu and Damu murder Jaggi and frame Namdev who later returns to seek revenge.

title: Amne Samne
subTitle: After being acquitted for his wife's murder, Deepak starts fresh under a different identity and ties the knot with a girl, Sapna. However, things take a turn when Sapna learns of his secret.

title: Amne Samne
subTitle: After being acquitted for his wife's murder, Deepak starts fresh under a different identity and ties the knot with a girl, Sapna. However, things take a turn when Sapna learns of his secret.

title: Raaj Tilak
subTitle: A king is cheated by his own men and his newborn son ends up in a gypsy camp. Several years later, when a substitute prince, Shamsher, inflicts atrocities on the royal family, the lost prince returns.

title: Comedy Station
subTitle: Various talented comedians perform hilarious skits and stand-up acts on diverse themes and topics to entertain the audience.

title: Comedy Station
subTitle: Various talented comedians perform hilarious skits and stand-up acts on diverse themes and topics to entertain the audience.

title: Aashiqui
subTitle: An aspiring singer meets a beautiful woman unexpectedly in a police station. Later, he chases after her, and eventually they start dating each other, but they have to deal with many problems thereafter.

title: Amar Shakti
subTitle: Shakti and Amar are separated in childhood when Shamsher kills their parents. Years later, Shakti vows to kill Shamsher while Amar is appointed as the army chief by Shamsher.

title: Prem Nagar
subTitle: A man, raised in wealth, hires a former air hostess as his secretary and falls in love with her. However, troubles come when his family accuses her of theft.

title: Aa Gale Lag Jaa
subTitle: Prem, a young man, must part from his lover Preeti even though she is pregnant. Years later, they reunite, but Preeti is about to engage another man.

title: Dildaar
subTitle: Banke, a farmer, falls in love with the village headman's daughter. However, when he is rejected, he vows to marry a woman better than the headman's daughter.

title: Raampur Ka Lakshman
subTitle: During a journey, Kedarnath Bhargav, his wife, Laxmi, and two sons, Ram and Lakshman, get separated and subsequently, they all lead different lives.

title: Chowkidar
subTitle: Shyam, son of a money lender, falls in love with a watchman's daughter, Radha. However, Gopal, a playboy, tries to create problems in their lives in an attempt to win Radha's love.

title: Chowkidar
subTitle: Shyam, son of a money lender, falls in love with a watchman's daughter, Radha. However, Gopal, a playboy, tries to create problems in their lives in an attempt to win Radha's love.

title: Sharafat
subTitle: Jagatram, who wants Rajesh to marry his daughter, is shocked to find out that he has been frequenting a brothel. Meanwhile, Rajesh too makes a discovery that could affect all their lives.

title: Lanka
subTitle: A gangster chooses to not marry his mistress and keeps her captive. One of his most-trusted protegees decides to plot a plan and free her.

title: Ahankaar
subTitle: Prabhat loses his voice in an accident while trying to save his stepmother. However, his sacrifice goes unappreciated by a family largely filled with selfish and unethical people.

title: Mr. Azaad
subTitle: Azaad, an orphan, takes to petty crime and acts like a modern-day Robin Hood. However, the death of an honest constable causes him to take stock of his actions.

title: Gair
subTitle: Vijay falls for Madhu and wishes to marry her. However, things take a turn when Raja, Vijay's step-brother, attempts to destroy their relationship.

title: Aurat Teri Yehi Kahani
subTitle: Savitri, a motherless girl, is forced to marry an elderly man for her family's sake. However, after her husband's sudden death, her life takes a turn for the worse.

title: Ghar Ek Mandir
subTitle: Brothers Prem, Vijay and Ravi are happy, but their lives change when Prem gets killed. Ravi must save his family from an evil man, Dharampal, while Vijay is preoccupied with Sapna.

title: Hum Aapke Dil Mein Rehte Hain
subTitle: Love begins with a marriage of convenience and stays with Megha and Vijay in the throes of separation. In a classic case of unfortunate timing, one realises it too soon, while the other is too late.

title: Meherbaan
subTitle: Ravi promises his father on his deathbed that he will take care of Chaurangilal's family whenever the need arises. However, a cunning Chaurangilal, concocts a plan to leave Ravi bankrupt and take over his wealth.
